known_issues.description: Auto-updater disabled — updates managed by package manager
Darwin-native .node modules (get-fonts, btime) require MACRUN_ALLOW_DARWIN_NATIVE=1 bypass

workarounds.description: Use system package manager or download updates manually
Set MACRUN_ALLOW_DARWIN_NATIVE=1 to bypass native module check. Modules are stubbed with recursive Proxy for crash safety.

degradation.recommended_action: Obsidian runs on Tier 0 with MACRUN_ALLOW_DARWIN_NATIVE=1. Consider Tier 4B VM-assisted execution for full compatibility without unsafe bypasses.

notes: Core workflows (editing, plugins, sync) operate correctly. Requires MACRUN_ALLOW_DARWIN_NATIVE=1 to bypass Darwin-native .node modules (get-fonts, btime). Modules are stubbed with recursive Proxy for crash safety. Auto-updater disabled per stubbing philosophy.
